airport.name: Shanghai Pudong International Airport
airport.toCity: Take Maglev train to Longyang Road, then metro. Use Didi/taxi apps with Chinese address.

transport.metro: Buy Shanghai Public Transport Card. Download Shanghai Metro app for routes and English support.
transport.taxi: Use Didi app for reliable taxis. Ensure meter is running; avoid unofficial cabs.
transport.didi: Download Didi, link foreign card. Enter destination in Chinese for clarity.
tips: Use metro cards for cashless travel.
Keep hotel address in Chinese handy.

payment.alipay: Set up Alipay international version with foreign card. Widely accepted for payments.
payment.wechatPay: Link foreign card to WeChat Pay for convenient transactions.
payment.cash: Carry small cash for street vendors. ATMs available citywide.
payment.foreignCard: Visa/Mastercard accepted in hotels and malls. Not all local shops.

tips: Book near metro stations for easy access.
Check for English-speaking staff at hotels.
Try street food but check cleanliness.
Learn basic food names in Chinese.

commonScams: Tea ceremony scams with high bills.
Fake goods sold near tourist spots.

emergency.localTip: Know your hotel's address in Chinese for quick help.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (April-May) or Autumn (September-November) for pleasant weather.
